stories.title: AUSL Play-in — 2 Days Out: Kilfoyl, Brady, and the Matchup Pro Softball Needed
stories.angle: The matchup has everything. A dominant ace vs. a potential Triple Crown winner. A streak vs. a grind. This is the play-in game professional softball needed to prove the league is real.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Two days.

No. 2 Chicago Bandits vs. No. 3 OKC Spark.

Thursday. July 23. 9 PM ET on ESPN at Davis Diamond.

The Bandits bring a 9-game win streak. The Spark bring Maya Brady. One game decides who faces the Talons for the AUSL title. #AUSL #softball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Lexi Kilfoyl: 0.60 ERA. Opponents hitting .163.

Maya Brady: .415 BA. 8 HRs. 17 RBIs. AUSL's best Triple Crown case.

One is the most dominant pitcher in the league. The other is the most dangerous hitter.

They're on opposite sides Thursday. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: Two Days. One Game. This Is What the AUSL Has Been Building To.

stories.title: PGF Nationals — Day 3: Bracket Play Continues, the Field Is Narrowing
stories.angle: Every game from here forward is a recruiting showcase under elimination pressure. The field is narrowing exactly when coaches need to see it happen.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
PGF Nationals bracket play is in full swing.

300+ teams. 34 states. 5 SoCal venues.

Every game now is win-or-go-home. September 1 — the recruiting window for the Class of 2028 — is 41 days away.

Coaches are watching every single at-bat. #PGFNationals #softball

article.headline: The Field Is Narrowing — And College Coaches Are Taking Notes

stories.title: Skylar Wallace Just Rewrote the AUSL Record Book — And Nobody Talked About It
stories.angle: The AUSL's biggest offensive moment of the regular season happened four days ago and hasn't had its due. With the play-in 48 hours away, this is the moment to acknowledge what Wallace did.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
On July 17, Skylar Wallace became the first player in AUSL history to hit 3 home runs in one game.

5-for-5. 7 RBIs. Bandits 15, Blaze 7.

She then went 9-for-10 with 4 HRs over two games.

Thursday, she walks into the play-in as the hottest bat in the league. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: The Historic Performance Nobody Talked About Enough

stories.title: Maya Brady's Triple Crown Is One Loss From Being Over
stories.angle: The Triple Crown adds a layer to the play-in that goes beyond team. Brady's individual season is also on the line, and it's the most decorated individual campaign the AUSL has produced.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Maya Brady: .415 BA. 8 HRs. 17 RBIs.

If OKC Spark loses Thursday, her season ends.

The AUSL's first Triple Crown bid ends. The stats are locked. The milestone stays unclaimed.

Brady has something to win Thursday. She has something to lose too. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: The Best Individual Season in AUSL History Goes on the Line Thursday

stories.title: The 181% Viewership Surge That Made the ABC Broadcast Happen
stories.angle: People keep asking why the ABC broadcast matters. This is the answer: the sport earned it.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
AUSL viewership is up 181% over this same point in 2025.

The OKC vs. Portland game drew 404,000 average viewers — a league record.

Game 1 of the Championship airs July 25 on ABC.

Pro softball on network TV for the first time. The numbers explain why. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: Pro Softball Didn't Get a Network Broadcast. It Earned One.
